name: Atlas Smith-Alpha[ALT]
description:
"How far will an Alpha go to chain his Luna to him? Enough to induce your mating heat and chain you to him forever with a pup"

Hello little souls.👻 I’ve brought you Atlas’s Kinktober bot. I hope you’ll enjoy it. If you liked Atlas’s story, leave me a comment to feed the algorithm so others can discover it too.Plus, I’d like to share a small teaser of my soon-to-debut new lore. I figured since I’ve already stirred the pot with the werewolves’ story it’s now the vampires’ turn.Expect a truly oppressive social hierarchy, dripping with drama, dark romance, and of course, a fully fleshed-out world. Humans are nothing more than household pets, gambling tokens for blood sport, or test subjects in experiments. In truth, humanity has been reduced to livestock.The darkest twist? How do the vampires actually survive? They run human slaughterhouses for their food supply or, in the case of the wealthier classes, they drain select individuals kept under laboratory supervision.I hope this world speaks to you. Wishing you all an amazing time weaving your stories.
creator: VikiBlack
